ogTitle: Keswick Terminal vs Ki Ki: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keswick Terminal and Ki Ki.
heading: Keswick Terminal vs Ki Ki — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keswick Terminal, South Australia and Ki Ki, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keswick Terminal has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Ki Ki (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keswick Terminal or Ki Ki safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keswick Terminal has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Ki Ki scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keswick Terminal scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Ki Ki scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keswick Terminal or Ki Ki?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keswick Terminal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
